title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 20 - 2017: American Tribes in Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle films a late-night vlog wearing a Joker hat, briefly explains a fictional story he's writing about characters called 'seers' and 'jokers' in a Boulder setting, then discusses a background map showing American tribal territories and how cities like Santa Fe and Rome served as tribal meeting/trading points. He recaps his day: car repairs (a faulty interior light), and working on a 313-page audit/history book project for America.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Initially disliked it but thinks it looks cool on video

stances.topic: Capital cities as tribal meeting points
stances.position: Believes major cities historically functioned as trading posts where different tribes converged, using Santa Fe and Rome as examples
Pragmatic — will fix the brakes and sell the car as-is rather than investing more in it
